patterns.title: Main Pool pH and Temperature Drift
patterns.description: Main pool showing pH at 7.95 (baseline 7.43) and temperature at 24.1C (baseline 28.0C). Both parameters drifting outside normal ranges.
patterns.evidence: pH 7.95 vs normal 7.0-7.8, Temp 24.1C vs normal 25.0-31.0C, sustained 100+ readings
patterns.recommendation: Check pH dosing and heating system

patterns.title: Spa Pool Temperature Change - Heating Restored?
patterns.description: Spa temperature jumped from ~10C (baseline) to 24.8C. May indicate heater repair/restart. However still not at typical spa temps (36-40C).
patterns.evidence: Current 24.8C vs baseline 10.2C, flagged as CRITICAL deviation from cold baseline
patterns.recommendation: Verify heating status - partial recovery or different operating mode?

patterns.title: Vitality ORP Elevated with Rising Temperature
patterns.description: ORP at 868 mV (above 700-850 normal range). Temperature rising trend +4.5C over 8 days.
patterns.evidence: ORP 868 vs baseline 755, temperature RISING trend sustained 8 days
patterns.recommendation: Monitor - elevated ORP may indicate overchlorination or chemistry imbalance

patterns.title: Multiple Pumps HIGH_OUTPUT_NO_RESULT
patterns.description: Vitality chlorine pump, Main chlorine pump, Main pH pump, Plunge pH pump all flagged with HIGH_OUTPUT_NO_RESULT - pumps running but no measured effect.
patterns.evidence: Effectiveness near zero despite activity, see baseline_manager pump analysis
patterns.recommendation: Check for empty tanks, blocked lines, or pump failures across facility

patterns.title: Spa Pool Chlorine Dosing Failure
patterns.description: Chlorine dosing pump appears non-functional. Yout=0% for 11+ days, measured chlorine only 0.04 mg/L vs setpoint 1.0 mg/L. STILL ACTIVE as of Feb 26.
patterns.recommendation: Immediate inspection of chlorine dosing system

patterns.title: Spa Pool Temperature Anomaly
patterns.description: Temperature was averaging 10.3C - UPDATE: Now at 24.8C as of Feb 15 data, partial recovery observed.
patterns.recommendation: UPDATED: Heating appears partially restored, monitor progress

patterns.title: Main Pool Data Transmission Gap
patterns.description: Main pool data stops 2026-02-02, other pools continue to 2026-02-08. Six days missing.
patterns.recommendation: Check controller communication and data upload

patterns.title: Vitality Pool Cold Start Recovery
patterns.description: Pool brought online from cold state. Temp 9.8C to 34C, chlorine 0.04 to 1.12 mg/L.
patterns.evidence: Large positive trends in temp, chlorine, ORP

patterns.title: Vitality ORP-Chlorine Lag Unusual
patterns.description: ORP leads chlorine by 27 minutes - typically should be simultaneous or chlorine leading.
patterns.recommendation: Review sensor placement relative to injection point

patterns.title: Plunge Pool Excellent pH Control
patterns.description: Best pH control - mean 7.32 exactly at setpoint 7.3.
patterns.recommendation: Use as reference for tuning other pools

recurring_issues.description: Multiple pumps showing HIGH_OUTPUT_NO_RESULT flags - running but ineffective
